title: GVPVP Lunar Edition
description: An optimized modpack made for Lunar Client
body:
Optimized Performance Modpack
This lightweight Fabric modpack is built for maximum FPS and responsiveness on client-side. It combines the most effective optimization mods—like Sodium, Lithium, Concurrent Chunk Management Engine, and Voxy—with utility enhancements such as Zoomify, Simple Voice Chat, and Litematica.
Expect smoother chunk loading, faster pings, reduced particle load, and cleaner visuals without sacrificing core gameplay. Ideal for multiplayer and large-scale worlds where every frame counts.
